commands.title: Create remediation pull request
commands.description: Open a remediation PR after evidence and rollback are documented.
commands.command: gh pr create --title "Remediate supply chain finding" --body-file docs/remediation-pr.md

commands.title: Rollback image signature policy
commands.description: Temporarily revert image signature enforcement if a false-positive blocks delivery.
commands.command: Revert the policy commit or disable the gate only through approved change control.

verification.expected: The finding remains visible until a durable fix is merged.

rollback.command: Re-enable signature enforcement after the exception window.
rollback.description: Rollback the temporary exception and restore the secure default.
